# HFEB Guide

> A comprehensive primer for Hermit Full English Breakfast in Premodern format.

## HFEB Guide

> A comprehensive primer for Hermit Full English Breakfast in Premodern format.

- [Battlefield Scrounger Lines](http://localhost:53880/docs/lines/): Advanced lines using Battlefield Scrounger in Hermit Full English Breakfast.
- [Contact](http://localhost:53880/docs/contact/): Get in touch.
- [How to Beat Hate?](http://localhost:53880/docs/matchups/): A practical guide to navigating disruption in Hermit Full English Breakfast.
- [How to Play](http://localhost:53880/docs/how-to-play/): Core lines and recurring patterns for Hermit Full English Breakfast.
- [Introduction](http://localhost:53880/docs/introduction/): An introduction to Hermit Full English Breakfast in Premodern format.
- [Lists](http://localhost:53880/docs/lists/): Decklists for Hermit Full English Breakfast.
- [Resources](http://localhost:53880/docs/resources/): Downloads, videos, and useful links for Hermit Full English Breakfast.
- [Tips, Tricks & Missing Pieces](http://localhost:53880/docs/sideboard-guide/): Tips, tricks, and what to do when key pieces are missing.

> Advanced lines using Battlefield Scrounger in Hermit Full English Breakfast.
